A. k m equals square root of left parenthesis 6 square root of 2 right parenthesis end root end root ² plus left parenthesis 6 right parenthesis ²
space space space space space equals square root of 72 plus 36 end root
space space space space space equals square root of 108
space space space space space equals 6 square root of 3
L equals 90 degree left parenthesis k a r e n a space s i k u minus s i k u right parenthesis
